title: Help requested after KwaNonqaba fire
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Those residents who lost all their belongings in a fire in New Rest, KwaNonqaba, need your help and donations.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Those residents who lost all their belongings in a fire in New Rest, KwaNonqaba, need your help and donations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to Shadrack Shishana, chairperson of the KwaNonqaba CPF, 14 structures burnt down on Saturday evening, 25 October, leaving multiple people without homes and belongings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services responded to the fire, and no injuries were reported.","html":"The Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services responded to the fire, and no injuries were reported."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Shishana said donations of clothing, food, blankets and other essential items are needed for the victims.","html":"Shishana said donations of clothing, food, blankets and other essential items are needed for the victims."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone able to assist may contact him on 084 911 7379 or Cynthia Nofemele on 083 517 3402.","html":"Anyone able to assist may contact him on 084 911 7379 or Cynthia Nofemele on 083 517 3402."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
